meaning: n.[植](葫芦科植物的)浆果,瓠果
examples: Water consumption, yields and WUE(water use efficiency) of summer squash(Cueurbita. pepo) under different water conditions were studied in solar greenhouse.
Comparative tests on the early yield, blossoming and fruit bearing habits and characteristics, commodity character of fruit among 6 cultivars of summer squash(Cucurbita pepo L) were conducted.
